messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-485 — Adopt upstream six-pack cleaner mutation-site SIZE gate: split any changed file over ~100 mutation sites before handoff (Stryker dry-run/instrument count)
What it solves: ORIGIN — BL-479 six-pack survey, secondary finding (b). The human approved BL-479's property-testing
amendment as-is and directed this adjacent finding be filed as its own low-priority ticket (the other
option was recording SKIP in docs/upstream-deviations.md). This ticket is that filing; it is a f…
Approval context: TWO things need the human's call before/while this builds: (a) the cleaner.prompt "## Mutation-Site Size" wording (a role-prompt edit is global — same posture as BL-479's amendment), drafted for review before it lands; and (b) the site-count THRESHOLD (upstream uses ~100; confirm or set our value) …
BL-485 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-485" (or "reject BL-485 <reason>") to act.
